mapper.update: UPDATE stage_evaluation SET related_document_id = #{relatedDocumentId}, doc_score = #{docScore}, completion_score = #{completionScore}, innovation_score = #{innovationScore}, tech_score = #{techScore}, total_score = #{totalScore}, comment = #{comment}, result = #{result}, teacher_id = #{teacherId}, is_late = #{isLate}, late_days = #{lateDays} WHERE evaluation_id = #{evaluationId}
